title: GAIANLifecycleEvent
description: A lifecycle state transition event for a GAIAN entity. Authority: C27 §2. Related: Issue #768.

event_id.description: UUID v4 for this specific transition event.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

gaian_id.description: The unique identifier of the GAIAN undergoing this transition.

from_state.description: The state the GAIAN is transitioning FROM.

to_state.description: The state the GAIAN is transitioning TO. Must be a valid transition per C27 §2 VALID_TRANSITIONS.

trigger.description: The class of trigger that caused this transition.

initiated_by.description: Steward ID, GAIAN self-identifier, or system principal that initiated this transition.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the transition.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this transition.

sentinel_finding_id.description: If this transition was triggered by a SENTINEL finding, the finding_id.

audit_entry_id.description: The AuditLogEntry.entry_id that records this event. Set after audit write completes.

examples.notes: Steward requested dormancy for scheduled maintenance.
